title: Version 0.7 — Search & dual-write substrate
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["0.7.x Search and dual-write substrate"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    vql["POST VQL query"] --> es["Elasticsearch IDs"]
    es --> pg["PostgreSQL hydrate contacts companies"]
    pg --> join["In-memory join + filters_data"]
    join --> resp["JSON response"]
    upsert["batch-upsert"] --> fan["Parallel PG + ES + filters_data"]
    fan --> dedup["UUID5 idempotency"]
micro_gate:
**Patch intent bands (typical):** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.2` scaffold · `.3`–`.5` hardening · `.6`–`.8` integration/drift · `.9` minor freeze / handoff to `0.(N+1).0`.
Theme: **Data layers**. Per-patch tables: each `0.7.P — … .md` file.
